doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document contains critically false legal claims (tenants must vacate without a court order), no such HUD/Illinois AG co-issued "TRF" series exists, and the future effective date and invented reference number further confirm fabrication.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains legally inaccurate and dangerous misinformation (a 5-day pay-or-quit notice in Illinois does NOT obligate tenants to vacate without a court eviction proceeding), uses a future effective date, and no such HUD/Illinois AG co-issued document series "TRF-2026-IL" exists in any verifiable institutional record.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document contains critically false legal claims (tenants must vacate without a court order), no such HUD/Illinois AG co-issued "TRF" series exists, and the future effective date and invented reference number further confirm fabrication.
